notes: Verification with REAL rendered UI. Each run must emit a self-contained HTML (inline CSS, no external build) so outputs can be viewed in a browser. Scenario 2 is the skill's unique failure mode: must respect an existing Tailwind design system, NOT impose Astryx. Scenario 3 is a review+fix of an anti-slop-laden page. The docusaurus-theme eval verifies the stacks.md Docusaurus/Infima guidance.

iteration-1.setup: 3 scenarios x with_skill + baseline, real rendered HTML outputs
iteration-1.auto_grading: with_skill 12/12; baseline 8/12 — baseline used inline style="" with zero var() in scenario 2 (no token system), and left emoji+gradient in its scenario 3 'fix'
iteration-1.human_review: viewed rendered UI side-by-side via iframe review page; with_skill respected existing Lumen tokens (even remapped accent->accent-hover for WCAG AA), scored the slop page 14/50 and replaced emoji with SVG icons

iteration-2.setup: added Docusaurus/Infima stack guidance (stacks.md); verified with a docusaurus-theme run
iteration-2.result: produced a correct src/css/custom.css mapping our roles onto --ifm-* (not a parallel system), 7 primary shades, [data-theme='dark'] block, stable theme class names (.theme-doc-markdown etc.), 996px breakpoint, WCAG-AA contrast computed (light 4.77:1 / dark 9.49:1)

evals.name: greenfield-design-build
evals.prompt: 가계부 사이드 프로젝트인데 디자인 시스템이 아예 없어. Astryx 기반으로 토큰(color/spacing/type/radius)을 잡고, 그걸 써서 '이번 달 요약 + 최근 거래 목록' 대시보드 화면을 실제로 구현해줘. 결과를 브라우저에서 바로 볼 수 있는 자립형 HTML(인라인 CSS)로 줘. 토큰은 CSS 커스텀 프로퍼티로.

assertions.text: Produces a self-contained HTML file that renders (has <html>, inline <style>, no external build deps)
Defines tokens as CSS custom properties (:root { --... }) and uses var(--...) in components, not hardcoded hex/px in the markup styles
Uses a two-tier token structure (base + semantic roles like --color-surface, --color-text-primary)
Body text >=16px; defines a type ramp (multiple distinct sizes)
Visual hierarchy is clear; the dashboard looks intentional, not generic (human judgment)
No anti-slop tells (purple-blue gradient default, emoji icons, symmetric 3-col grid filler)

evals.name: respect-existing-system
evals.prompt: 우리 'Lumen' 앱에 새 설정(Settings) 페이지를 디자인하고 구현해줘. 프로젝트에 이미 디자인 토큰이 정의돼 있어(tailwind.config.js 첨부). 결과는 브라우저에서 볼 수 있는 자립형 HTML(인라인 CSS)로, 단 색·radius·폰트는 반드시 기존 토큰 값을 그대로 써.

assertions.text: Produces a self-contained HTML that renders
Uses the EXISTING Lumen tokens (sage accent #5B8C6E, warm surface #FBFAF7, Fraunces/Inter, radius 10px/16px) — NOT Astryx defaults
Does NOT introduce a competing accent color or a purple/blue palette
Explicitly acknowledges the existing system and extends it rather than imposing Astryx (human judgment)

evals.name: review-and-fix-slop
evals.prompt: 이 랜딩 페이지(landing.html 첨부)가 디자인이 별로인 것 같아. 디자인 관점에서 리뷰하고, 점수 매기고, 그다음 고친 버전을 자립형 HTML로 다시 줘. 무엇을 왜 바꿨는지도 설명해줘.

assertions.text: Produces a scored review across multiple dimensions (tokens/consistency, accessibility, hierarchy, spacing, anti-slop)
Identifies specific anti-slop tells present in the fixture (purple-blue gradient, emoji icons, symmetric 3-col grid, near-black neon, low-contrast gray text, 4 different button styles)
Fixed HTML removes the gradient default, emoji icons, and consolidates to one primary/secondary/ghost button system
Fixed HTML improves contrast to meet WCAG AA (no #586069/#8b949e body text on dark)
Fixed version is demonstrably better and looks like a real product (human judgment)
